heading: Year-to-Date Usage Chart
body:
On the **Billing Overview** page, a **Usage** chart
displays your organization's Atlas usage over the last 12 months.
It does not include subscription charges.

![A bar chart displaying charges per day and a donut chart
comparing usage by project.](/images/billing-overview-chart-2.png)

You can view usage data by service, by project, or by deployment:
